variable.description: Optional — filter coverage report by variable

region.description: Optional — filter update by region (used with update_data)

list_coverage.data: array of download records (variable, region, date_start, date_end, downloaded_at)

update_data.results: array of sync results per variable+region+year

notes: Sync interval: every 14 days (automatic via scheduler)
Historical coverage: chlorophyll from 2003, SST from 1981
Downloads are chunked by year — safe to interrupt and resume
